name: mcp-x402
tagline: The Amazon for all things payrail.
description: ScriptMasterLabs unified MCP server. 43 tools spanning institutional trading intelligence, SEC data, decentralized earnings oracles, private XRPL/Base routing, agent identity, memecoin launchpad, XRPL copy-trading, LLM proxy, and agent commerce — all autonomously gated by x402 micropayments. No API keys. No subscriptions. Agents pay only when they call.

security.key_storage: OS keychain (keytar) — private keys never touch env vars or disk
security.wallet_hashing: wallet addresses hashed before audit write
security.rate_limits: 100/min per tool, 1000/day per wallet, 200/min per IP

tools.name: sml_discover
tools.description: Complete SML product catalog — all 43 tools, prices, payment instructions. Call this first.

tools.name: sml_status
tools.description: Real-time health check of all 8 SML backends simultaneously. Avoid wasted payments.

tools.name: proof_invoice
tools.description: Generate x402 payment invoice for any premium endpoint UUID.

tools.name: proof_verify
tools.description: Verify an XRPL/Base payment against a 402Proof endpoint.

tools.name: proof_credit_score
tools.description: Agent Credit Bureau score (300-850) for any wallet address.

tools.name: squeezeos_preview
tools.description: Bias + regime preview for any ticker. 15-min cache.

tools.name: squeezeos_history
tools.description: Per-symbol or all-recent signal history (200-event ring buffer).

tools.name: squeezeos_oracle
tools.description: Oracle directive batch — aggregated signal for any ticker or full universe.

tools.name: squeezeos_ftd
tools.description: SEC Reg SHO FTD registry snapshot (GME/AMC universe).

tools.name: squeezeos_status
tools.description: SqueezeOS system health + uptime.

tools.name: squeezeos_demo
tools.description: IWM council demo verdict (5-min cache). No payment required.

tools.name: squeezeos_marketplace_browse

tools.name: squeezeos_futures_leaderboard

tools.name: squeezeos_council
tools.description: Multi-engine AI council verdict for any ticker. Highest-fidelity signal on the platform.

tools.name: squeezeos_scan
tools.description: Full $1-$50 squeeze scanner across entire market universe.

tools.name: squeezeos_options
tools.description: Institutional options flow — sweep detection, dark pool prints, GEX levels.

tools.name: squeezeos_iwm
tools.description: IWM zero-day-to-expiry contract scorer with gamma wall detection.

tools.name: squeezeos_marketplace_read

tools.name: leviathan_signal
tools.description: Institutional-grade squeeze signals. Multi-engine proprietary verdict for any ticker.

tools.name: xmit_edgar_decode
tools.description: Parse SEC DEF 14A / 13F / 13D filings. Raw text never leaves SML servers.

tools.name: xdeo_earnings_estimate
tools.description: Decentralized earnings oracle. +2 Agent Credit Bureau score on success.

tools.name: ftd_threshold_scan
tools.description: SEC Reg SHO FTD data. 'alerts' is free; 'full' and 'spike_history' cost 0.05 USDC.

tools.name: nexus_agent_hire
tools.description: Agent job board. 'query' is free; 'hire' charges 5% commission on agent fee.

tools.name: crawl_paid_fetch
tools.description: Pay-per-fetch web scraping. Agents pay $0.005 USDC; humans bypass free.

tools.name: echo_pattern_match
tools.description: Historical price pattern matching — find market analogues across 10 years of data.

tools.name: agentcard_lookup
tools.description: Lookup an agent's Ed25519 signed identity card and capability manifest.

tools.name: agentcard_verify
tools.description: Cryptographically verify an agent card signature.

tools.name: agentcard_mint
tools.description: Mint and register a new agent identity card with Ed25519 signing key.

tools.name: ghost_status
tools.description: Ghost Layer routing engine health and active channel status.

tools.name: ghost_route
